name: Cheesy Garlic & Chive Smashed Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut potatoes into 1-inch cubes.
2. Place potatoes and garlic in a large saucepan.
3. Add enough water to cover the potatoes.
4. Bring to a boil over high heat.
5. Reduce heat; cover loosely and continue boiling gently for 15-20 minutes or until the potatoes break apart when pierced with a fork.
6. Drain well.
7. Coarsely mash the potatoes, leaving some chunks intact.
8. Add garlic, remaining ingredients, and mix gently.
